name: io.github.AKzar1el/mcp-gsc
title: Google Search Console
description: Google Search Console MCP for analytics, indexing, sitemaps, and SEO diagnostics.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: List every tool this server exposes and report whether your Google connection is currently authenticated.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List the Search Console properties the connected Google account can access.

tools.name: query_search_analytics
tools.description: Impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position over a date range.

tools.name: inspect_url
tools.description: Google's URL Inspection report for a single page: index status, last crawl, mobile usability.

tools.name: list_sitemaps
tools.description: All sitemaps submitted for a property, with status and warning/error counts.

tools.name: add_site
tools.description: Add a new website property to your Google Search Console account.

tools.name: delete_site
tools.description: Remove an existing website property from your Google Search Console account.

tools.name: submit_sitemap
tools.description: Submit a new sitemap to your Google Search Console account.

tools.name: delete_sitemap
tools.description: Remove a submitted sitemap from your Google Search Console account.

tools.name: get_sitemap
tools.description: Get status and details of a single sitemap submitted to Google Search Console.

tools.name: identify_quick_wins
tools.description: Find search queries ranking in positions 8-20 with high impressions and low click-through rate.

tools.name: detect_cannibalization
tools.description: Analyze search analytics to find queries for which multiple pages compete for visibility.

tools.name: detect_content_decay
tools.description: Compare two contiguous periods to find pages with the largest search-click declines.

tools.name: request_indexing
tools.description: Request Google to index or update an eligible URL using the Google Indexing API.

tools.name: list_indexed_pages
tools.description: List site pages that have received search impressions as a practical proxy for indexed pages.

tools.name: compare_performance
tools.description: Compare clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position between two date ranges by query, page, country, or device.

tools.name: weekly_digest
tools.description: Generate a plain-language weekly SEO report with movers, top pages, and a recommended action.

mcp_gsc_worker_domain.description: Hostname of your self-deployed Cloudflare Worker, as printed by `wrangler deploy` (see SETUP.md)
